Our Story

A Premium Dining
Experience

Lazzati Restaurant brings together the finest flavours of Desi, Chinese, Continental, and Fast Food cuisine in one stunning location inside Pakistan Club Inn Hotel, Sukkur.

🌙

Evening Outdoor Setup

Beautiful open-air dining experience every evening — perfect for families and gatherings.

🍲

Karahi & Handi Specialties

Our signature Karahi and Handi dishes are cooked fresh to order with traditional spices.

Kids Play Area & Bonfire

Vast outdoor play area with rides for children, plus cosy bonfire evenings in winter for the whole family.

How We Serve

Our Services

Dine-In
Premium indoor and beautiful evening outdoor seating at Pakistan Club Inn Hotel, Sukkur.
Curbside Pickup
Order ahead and collect at the curb — fast and hassle-free for your convenience.
Home Delivery
Safe and fast no-contact delivery straight to your door. Call or WhatsApp to order now.
Bonfire Nights
Every winter we light up the outdoor lawn with a cosy bonfire — the perfect evening experience for families and groups.
Kids Play Area
A dedicated outdoor kids zone with multiple rides and play equipment — so the little ones enjoy as much as the adults do.
Events & Groups
Spacious outdoor lawn ideal for family gatherings, corporate dinners, and private events. Pre-book your event today.
